top_signals.title: Markets Rally on Hope for US-Iran Peace Deal | Closing Bell
top_signals.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX shares gain for second day after blockbuster debut
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk’s AI, satellite and rocket group climbs 19.6% further on Monday
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX stock jumps 20% in first full day of trading after record debut
top_signals.summary: SpaceX is valued at over $2 trillion after its stock rallied on the first day of trading last week.
